messages: Can you find me? I'm lost in the shadows.
I can't see the way home. Will you come find me?
The dark is so cold. Please, come find me.
I'm lost and scared. Can you help me find my way?
I hear whispers. Please, find me before they do.
I can't find my way out. Will you come get me?
The shadows are closing in. Can you find me?
I'm all alone in the dark. Please, come find me.
I don't know where I am. Can you help me?
The night is so quiet. Will you come find me?
Please find me. The darkness is getting closer.
I'm lost in the night. Can you help me?
I can't see anything. Will you come get me?
The shadows are creeping closer. Can you find me?
I'm alone in the dark. Please, come find me.
I don't know where to go. Can you help me?
The night is so cold. Please, come get me.
I'm lost in the shadows. Will you find me?
I hear footsteps. Please, come find me.
The darkness is swallowing me. Can you help me?
